headline: WEC Energy Group to announce 2026 first-quarter results May 5
summary: WEC Energy Group Inc. (NYSE: WEC) will issue its 2026 first-quarter earnings news release before the stock market opens Tuesday, May 5. A conference call for investors and security analysts is scheduled for the same day at 1 p.m. Central time.
